hero.name: Nanami Wakayam
hero.title: Entrepreneur, Model & Social Impact Leader
hero.subtitle: Building bridges between Japan and Nepal through sustainable agriculture and ethical business

about.title: About Me
about.description: Former model turned social entrepreneur, I survived the 2015 Nepal earthquake while climbing Everest and transformed that experience into a mission to create positive change. Through Our Farms, I'm pioneering sustainable strawberry cultivation in Nepal, empowering local communities, and building ethical supply chains.
